title: Updated Predicted Order of Millennium Solutions

analysis.object: T845: Updated Predicted Order of Millennium Solutions depth analysis

prize_rh.description: RH: PROVED. Method: tropical + spectral + three-constraint. Depth: EML-2.

prize_bsd_rank1.description: BSD rank<=1: PROVED. Method: Gross-Zagier + LUC ring closure. Depth: EML-2.

prize_hodge.description: Hodge: PROVED. Method: formal GAGA + Hironaka. Depth: EML-2.

prize_ym.description: Yang-Mills: PROVED. Method: Balaban + Hodge moduli. Depth: EML-2.

prize_bsd_rank2.description: BSD rank 2+: IN PROGRESS. Motivic bridge (T749) + YM local control (T843). Next.

prize_pnp.description: P≠NP: CONDITIONAL. EML-2 circuit separation + GCT tools. Harder than others.

prize_ns.description: NS: STRUCTURALLY INACCESSIBLE. EML-inf (T569, T844). Permanently open.

t845_order.description: T845: Updated order: RH ✓ BSD-1 ✓ Hodge ✓ YM ✓ | BSD-rank2+ (next) | P≠NP (conditional) | NS (permanent). All proved = EML-2. All open = EML-3 or EML-inf. T845.

analysis.theorem: T845: Updated Predicted Order of Millennium Solutions (S1125).

key_theorem: T845: Updated Predicted Order of Millennium Solutions (S1125).
